blocks.text: MacIntyre storms Texas — but the real weekend starts tomorrow
Kristoffer Reitan sits T7 at -6 with rounds remaining. Åberg lurks four back in second. This Masters warm-up at TPC San Antonio could yet have a Nordic twist at the top.
🎾 Sat — Monte-Carlo Masters opens on clay. Ruud already in form: semifinal in exhibition this week — Roland Garros prep begins now.
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders. Seven Norwegians on the cobbles from Antwerp to Oudenaarde — Monument number one of spring.

blocks.label: ⚽ Tuesday — Champions League QF First Legs
items: Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich — Bernabéu, 21:00 ★★
